note: Scrimshaw (sailor's incised-and-rubbed bone engraving) is novel as source domain. R047 covered watermark capacity-bound impossibility; R200 covered Cordovan stamping but with feedback-saturation mechanism. The scrimshaw mechanism is incise + fill + polish (residue-only-in-cavities) — distinct from stamping (raised-impression) and from steganography (capacity bound). Accept.
